com.pax.poslink.peripheries

Class SerialPortParameters

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.pax.poslink.peripheries.SerialPortParameters

  • public class SerialPortParameters
extends java.lang.Object
    The connect parameters for POSLinkSerialPort

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      static interface  SerialPortParameters.ComPort
      The com port options.
      static interface  SerialPortParameters.ParityCheck
      The parity check options

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      int getBaudRate() 
      int getComPort() 
      int getDataBits() 
      int getParityCheck() 
      int getStopBits() 
      void setBaudRate(int baudRate)
      Default is 1200.
      void setComPort(int comPort)
      Default value is different from different terminal.
      void setDataBits(int dataBits)
      Default is 7.
      void setParityCheck(int parityCheck)
      One of the value in SerialPortParameters.ParityCheck.
      void setStopBits(int stopBits)
      Default is 1.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • SerialPortParameters

        public SerialPortParameters()

    • Method Detail

      • setBaudRate

        public void setBaudRate(int baudRate)
        Default is 1200. It should be one of the typical baud rate, such as 2400, 4800, 9600, 14400, 115200....
        Parameters:
        baudRate - baudRate

      • setDataBits

        public void setDataBits(int dataBits)
        Default is 7. It should be 7 or 8.
        Parameters:
        dataBits - data bits.

      • setParityCheck

        public void setParityCheck(int parityCheck)
        One of the value in SerialPortParameters.ParityCheck. Default is even.
        Parameters:
        parityCheck - parityCheck

      • setStopBits

        public void setStopBits(int stopBits)
        Default is 1. It should be 1 or 2.
        Parameters:
        stopBits - stopBits

      • setComPort

        public void setComPort(int comPort)
        Default value is different from different terminal. For A80, it will use SerialPortParameters.ComPort.COM2. Typically you do not need to set this.
        Parameters:
        comPort - comPort

      • getBaudRate

        public int getBaudRate()

      • getDataBits

        public int getDataBits()

      • getParityCheck

        public int getParityCheck()

      • getStopBits

        public int getStopBits()

      • getComPort

        public int getComPort()
